rulings.Case Title: MYRA DANIELS VS. ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File The Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF MYRA DANIELS' Motion For Leave To File The Third Amended Complaint. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File Third Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Proposed amendments are based on the same basic set of facts as existing causes of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel The Continued Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF DEBORA SILVERMAN's Motion To Compel The Continued Deposition. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Continued Deposition is GRANTED as follows: deposition shall be confined to the contents of Ex. O to Franklin Declaration and limited to 45 minutes. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF DEBORA SILVERMAN's Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions. Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Requests for Admissions Admitted is DENIED. Insufficient meet and confer, i.e. letter sent on 6/4/13 requiring response by 6/6/13 10 a.m. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TODD QUACKENBUSH VS. TODD DJUREEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Hearing On Partition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF TODD QUACKENBUSH's Motion For Hearing On Partition. Plaintiff's Motion for Hearing on Partition is GRANTED as to apportionment of sale proceeds specified in moving papers. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELEAZAR MORA et al VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY and HOMEWARD RESIDENTIAL, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurer to First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Complaint is premature as there was no default declared and no foreclosure sale. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, VS. FREDERICK MUELLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership'S Motion For Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 5 - Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership'S Motion For Judgment. Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Judgment Hearing Required for status. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STOCKTON, JUDITH AS TRUSTEE OF THE JUDITH STOCKTON VS. MARIANGELA URQUIZO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Deposition And Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 6 - PLAINTIFF STOCKTON, JUDITH AS TRUSTEE OF THE JUDITH STOCKTON's Motion To Compel Defendant'S Deposition And Production Of Documents. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Defendant's Deposition and Production of Documents is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $793.75 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOUNIR KARDOSH VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To Amend Or Withdraw Req For Admission No 21.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT JOHN HAYES' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To Amend Or Withdraw Req For Admission No 21. Defendant's Motion for Leave to Amended or Withdraw Request for Admission #21 is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Request for sanctions is DENIED, this type of request requires motion and not stipulation. CCP 2033.300. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARDEANOUS MAYE VS. ELISHA MAYE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S June 7, 2013 Order Denying Defts; Motion To Set Aside Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT ELISHA MAYE and ELIZA MAYE's Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S June 7, 2013 Order Denying Defendants Motion To Set Aside Judgment. Defendant's Motion for Reconsideration is DENIED. Defendants failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008, no new facts or circumstances presented in the timely filed motion, unauthorized untimely amended motion, or unauthorized untimely second declaration. June 12, 2013 and June 14, 2013 filings by Defendants are stricken. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 324 LARKIN STREET, LP VS. AYMAN SHEHADEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT AYMAN SHEHADEH's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons and Complaint is GRANTED, subject to opposition as to June 4, 2013 improper service on counsel. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RENEE GILLIAM-WHITE VS. SEAN MCLOUGHLIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 10 - DEFENDANT SEAN MCLOUGHLIN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendants' Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment is GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) filing answer no later than June 18, 2013 4 p.m.; (3) posting $ 7,626.69 with the Court no later than June 18, 2013 4 p.m. Prevailing Party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KUN RONG TAN VS. CARMINA M. MENDEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 11 - DEFENDANT CARMINA MENDEZ MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default/ Default Judgment is GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) filing answer no later than June 18, 2013 4 p.m.; (3) posting $ 6,650 with the Court no later than June 18, 2013 4 p.m. Prevailing Party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MEHER PATEL VS. TERENCE JENKINS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 12 - DEFENDANT TERENCE JENKINS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendants' Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment is GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) filing answers no later than June 18, 2013 4 p.m.; and (3) posting $900 with the Court no later than June 18, 2013 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. GARDENIA DARN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 18, 2013, line 13 - DEFENDANT GARDENIA DARN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default/ Default Judgment is GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) Defendant presenting declaration from her doctor that from May 28, 2013 to June 5, 2013 she was not able to leave her apartment; and (3) filing answer no later than June 18, 2013 by 4 p.m. =(501/REQ)
